Degen Token

The Degen L3 chain is live now! EVM compatible, low transaction fees, built for Degens!

Liquidity Mining

Earn points by contributing liquidity to our Uniswap V3 DEGEN/WETH pool, which features a 0.3% fee tier. There's no need to lock LP NFTs. You will earn points based on the amount of liquidity you provide and its alignment with the current price range. The next opportunity to claim points is June 06, 2024.

Adding liquidity to a pool comes with the risk of impermanent loss!

Aerodrome Incentives

Additionally, we've established an Aerodrome DEGEN/WETH liquidity pool that is eligible for incentives on the Aerodrome platform. These incentives operate independently from liquidity mining points. We encourage you to contribute liquidity wherever you prefer.

Claim

Connect your wallet to claim your rewards!

Liquidity Mining Season 2 rewards can be claimed until June 06, 2024.
